reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 21-Night Western Europe Coastal Discovery and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Very relaxing experience
reviews.body: Refined atmosphere, excellent service, and beautiful ship design. Excursion slots filled up quickly, so book early. Slipped off to 21-Night Western Europe Coastal Discovery and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Very relaxing experience
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 21-Night Western Europe Coastal Discovery and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night Western Europe Coastal Discovery and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 21-Night Western Europe Coastal Discovery | Queen Anne | Cunard Line
seo.metaDescription: Book a 21-night Western Europe cruise onboard Queen Anne of Cunard Line. Visiting Southampton, Bordeaux (Le Verdon), Bilbao. Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
